meta_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't finish projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your product development. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit with Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your MVP faster than ever.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome stems from decision paralysis and architectural debt. By utilizing a pre-built SaaS starter kit, you offload boilerplate authentication, billing, and database setup. Combining this with AI-driven coding agents like Claude Code allows you to focus strictly on your unique value proposition and revenue-generating features.
content.intro:
Your repository is a graveyard of half-baked ideas. Every founder hits the wall where the initial momentum of the 'great idea' crashes into the grueling reality of setting up Stripe webhooks, user auth, and database migrations. It is the silent killer of startups, turning visionary founders into permanent tinkerers who never ship.

But the game has changed. You are no longer required to build from scratch. By adopting a production-grade SaaS starter kit and pairing it with autonomous coding agents, you strip away the friction. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about engineering a pipeline that turns your vision into a live, paying product before your motivation expires.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize a robust SaaS starter kit to handle all foundational complexities. This removes the 'blank page' anxiety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js SaaS boilerplate including Supabase auth, Stripe subscription flow, and Tailwind CSS configuration.

steps.title: Define Database Schema
steps.description: Establish a scalable data model. A clear schema prevents future refactoring bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with Users, Organizations, and SubscriptionPlans tables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx prisma migrate dev --name init_schema'

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Automate billing early. If you can't collect money, you don't have a business—you have a hobby.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Stripe webhooks for checkout sessions and subscription lifecycle events, integrating with the existing user table.

steps.title: Build Core Business Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on your MVP features while the boilerplate manages the overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a secure API route for the core product feature, ensuring it validates user subscription status via middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement core feature logic with subscription gate'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Launch immediately. Perfection is the enemy of revenue.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration file to optimize build times and environment variable management for production.

pro_tips: Never build custom auth; use Clerk or Supabase Auth to save 40+ hours of security engineering.
Prioritize 'Stripe-first' development; if the billing flow isn't testable, your product isn't ready for users.
Use Claude Code to write your integration tests simultaneously with your features to ensure long-term stability.
Avoid 'feature creep' by strictly limiting your MVP to the single problem that users are willing to pay for today.
Automate your CI/CD pipeline from day one; manual deployments are a source of human error and developer fatigue.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on the 'First 10 Paying Users' experiment. Collect feedback, iterate on the core value, and use your AI agents to rapidly deploy improvements based on real user data.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in isolation and start shipping products that generate recurring revenue. Join a community of founders who have successfully crossed the finish line. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
